name: CCTV-Smartphone-AI-Monitoring
description: 本地监控 + AI 视觉 — LAN-based smartphone-powered AI monitoring framework with structured event output for data acquisition and analysis.
summaryZh: 本地监控 + AI 视觉 — LAN-based smartphone-powered AI monitoring framework with structured event output for data acquisition and analysis. 这是偏视觉和多模态方向的项目，适合关注图像理解与感知交互。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合做多模态体验、视觉应用和创作工具的团队。
